text: - ii. Are  being,  or  have  been,  obtained  by  Subcontractor  in  support  of  Subcontractor's  liability  and indemnity  obligations  under  this  Subcontract.  Irrespective  of  the  requirements  as  to  insurance  to  be carried as provided for herein, the insolvency, bankruptcy or failure of any insurance company carrying insurance ofSubcontractor, or the failure of any insurance company to pay claims accruing, shall not be held to affect, negate or waive any of the provisions of this Subcontract.
